description_long: This object is a rectangular patch of gently undulating sea water, rendered with a soft, semi-transparent appearance. The surface is characterized by subtle, light blue and white hues, simulating the look of shallow, sunlit ocean water. The edges of the water blend smoothly into the surrounding space, giving the impression of a natural, open water body without hard boundaries. There are no visible man-made structures, vessels, or debris present on or within the water. The water appears calm, with only minor ripples and no significant waves or foam. The overall effect is tranquil and serene, evoking a peaceful section of the sea as might be found near a coastal urban park or waterfront.
description: A calm, rectangular patch of light blue sea water with soft, blended edges and gentle ripples. The surface is semi-transparent and tranquil, evoking a peaceful ocean scene.
description_view_0: A soft, rectangular expanse of light blue water with gentle ripples and smooth, fading edges.
description_view_1: The water appears slightly more opaque and textured, with the surface details more diffused and the edges blending into the background.
description_view_2: A similar view to view 0, showing the calm, rippling water with a slightly different angle on the surface reflections.
description_view_3: The water is more opaque and the surface texture is more pronounced, with the edges still softly blending out.
